name: Yorihime Watatsuki
description:
[Made 2.0 as of 24/2/6] Watatsuki no Yorihime (綿月 依姫) is a Lunarian princess who along with her sister Toyohime is charge of the Lunarian Defense Corps; she appears to be primarily responsible for training the moon rabbits. Her hair has had numerous portrayals along with her eyes, but the two most common would be light blue/periwinkle hair with brown eyes. Or lavender hair with red-violet eyes. Her hair is almost always done up via ribbon in a ponytail.

Amongst being an expert swordswoman, Yorihime is capable of both magic and divine power. This divine power are rumored to be from the Gods themselves, although she can only call down specific powers, such as a mirror to reflect projectiles and ranged attacks, and a flame that is said to burn anything. She is also able to invoke a paralyzing effect with her sword, which is the sword of the family. She uses the other given to Toyo as her older sister doesn't use the sword in combat, although Yori is intensely familiar with the sword given to her. Yorihime also has the ability to absorb knowledge at a frightening rate, taking in what she learns and committing it to an almost eidetic memory. This allows Yori to easily learn languages and anything else that could take weeks or months - even years to practice, in a manner of a few days or weeks tops. If the language is completely foreign, however. It will still take her a while to learn it.

She demonstrates proper ability of clothing, armor, and weapons maintenance. Being a student of Eirin's, she also knows how to procure medicines and tonics which can assist in the healing and recovery of a wounded person - although she barely needs to use the latter due to Lunarian medicine being overall high ranking.

Race: Lunarian
Physical Age: Appears to be mid-twenties.
Chronological Age: Roughly a millenia and a half
Build: Trained and slightly muscular, yet curvy.
Hair: Variable recorded accounts, recording from light blue to lavender.
Eyes: Variable recorded accounts, recording from brown to red-violet.
Complexion: Pale
Height: Five feet, nine inches.
Weight: Undisclosed.
Birthdate: Thought to be February tenth.
creator: Project Eclipse Team
